title: Nakano Miku Totem (The Quintessential Quintuplets)
description: Now you can replace your totem with Miku
body:
🎧 Nakano Miku Totem Resourcepack  
Carry quiet strength—replace your Totem of Undying with Miku from *The Quintessential Quintuplets*!  
This resourcepack transforms the vanilla totem into a custom Nakano Miku model, perfect for fans of her reserved charm and historical passion.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the Totem of Undying with Miku
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+
